title: array size

messages.description: pointer to the array if '-s' flag is used

arguments.description: array name if no flags are given

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

flags.name: -f <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of element structure

body: "array define" maintains an array and can name it so that other objects can find it (and later should have some alternative, anonymous way to be found
